title: SPEL+ Security Command
description:
SPEL+ Security Command

SPEL+ Security Command

Here are the SPEL+ commands that are enabled with the Security function.

For details, refer to Help or the following manual:

    SPEL+ Language Reference

Command	Description

LogIn
		  Function	Logs
		 in the application as another user at runtime.

GetCurrentUser$
		 Function	Returns
		 the login ID of the current user.
